172.reason: [This pushWord() is called before handling the current symbol, which may push an empty or incomplete token. It should be removed here to avoid pushing garbage tokens.]

195.reason: [This line calls pushWord() again after already calling it at the start of the block, causing empty or duplicate tokens to be pushed when buf[i] is a non-space symbol not handled by special cases like &, |, etc.]
